message.content: This parent section (pages 20–27) compiles comprehensive 2025 performance rankings for the global mobile gaming market, structured as reference tables and lists to support retrieval queries on platform-specific performance, advertising volume, and social media influence. Topics & Dates: Covers global mobile game rankings, iOS and Android market performance (ad placement, downloads, revenue), top advertising companies, and overseas social media brand influence, with all datasets spanning January 1 to December 31, 2025. Tables & Metrics: Contains multiple ranked datasets including a global games list (ranks 11–30), iOS and Android leaderboards (投放榜 TOP30, 下载榜 TOP20, 收入榜 TOP20), a Google Play download revenue TOP20 company table, a global ad volume TOP20 company list, and an overseas social media influence TOP20 ranking. Key metrics tracked are ordinal rank positions, deduplicated ad creative counts, official platform in-app purchase (IAP) revenue, advertised product counts per company, and OneSight social media influence scores. Entities & Genres: Features prominent titles such as Wuthering Waves, MONOPOLY GO!, Last War: Survival, Whiteout Survival, Roblox, PUBG MOBILE, Genshin Impact, and Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. Developers/publishers include Tencent, Scopely, Playrix, Supercell, FunPlus, IGG, VOODOO, and 乐信圣文. Genres span strategy, RPG, puzzle, casual, action, simulation, card, casino, and word games. Definitions & Procedures: Ad placement rankings are calculated by the cumulative number of deduplicated ad creatives per advertiser, with each distinct game package counted as one product. Revenue rankings strictly track official App Store or Google Play IAP revenue, explicitly excluding mainland China data, third-party Android channels, and third-party advertising revenue. Claims & Evidence: Data is sourced from 广大大 (Ad Intelligence/APP Intelligence) modules, official platform stores, and publicly aggregated social media data from Facebook, X, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Notable findings establish Wuthering Waves as the #1 overseas social media brand (OneSight Score: 486.3), followed by Genshin Impact (477.9) and Zenless Zone Zero (476.0), while titles like Last War: Survival and MONOPOLY GO! demonstrate cross-metric dominance across ad, download, and revenue leaderboards. Figures & Limitations: No figures are present. The "媒体声音" (Media Voices) subsection (page 27) is a structural placeholder with no data, and the Google Play company table includes an unpopulated "Main Advertised Product" column. The content functions strictly as empirical reference data without procedural instructions or analytical commentary.

response_text: This parent section (pages 20–27) compiles comprehensive 2025 performance rankings for the global mobile gaming market, structured as reference tables and lists to support retrieval queries on platform-specific performance, advertising volume, and social media influence. Topics & Dates: Covers global mobile game rankings, iOS and Android market performance (ad placement, downloads, revenue), top advertising companies, and overseas social media brand influence, with all datasets spanning January 1 to December 31, 2025. Tables & Metrics: Contains multiple ranked datasets including a global games list (ranks 11–30), iOS and Android leaderboards (投放榜 TOP30, 下载榜 TOP20, 收入榜 TOP20), a Google Play download revenue TOP20 company table, a global ad volume TOP20 company list, and an overseas social media influence TOP20 ranking. Key metrics tracked are ordinal rank positions, deduplicated ad creative counts, official platform in-app purchase (IAP) revenue, advertised product counts per company, and OneSight social media influence scores. Entities & Genres: Features prominent titles such as Wuthering Waves, MONOPOLY GO!, Last War: Survival, Whiteout Survival, Roblox, PUBG MOBILE, Genshin Impact, and Mobile Legends: Bang Bang. Developers/publishers include Tencent, Scopely, Playrix, Supercell, FunPlus, IGG, VOODOO, and 乐信圣文. Genres span strategy, RPG, puzzle, casual, action, simulation, card, casino, and word games. Definitions & Procedures: Ad placement rankings are calculated by the cumulative number of deduplicated ad creatives per advertiser, with each distinct game package counted as one product. Revenue rankings strictly track official App Store or Google Play IAP revenue, explicitly excluding mainland China data, third-party Android channels, and third-party advertising revenue. Claims & Evidence: Data is sourced from 广大大 (Ad Intelligence/APP Intelligence) modules, official platform stores, and publicly aggregated social media data from Facebook, X, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, and LinkedIn. Notable findings establish Wuthering Waves as the #1 overseas social media brand (OneSight Score: 486.3), followed by Genshin Impact (477.9) and Zenless Zone Zero (476.0), while titles like Last War: Survival and MONOPOLY GO! demonstrate cross-metric dominance across ad, download, and revenue leaderboards. Figures & Limitations: No figures are present. The "媒体声音" (Media Voices) subsection (page 27) is a structural placeholder with no data, and the Google Play company table includes an unpopulated "Main Advertised Product" column. The content functions strictly as empirical reference data without procedural instructions or analytical commentary.
